cited_facts.why_it_matters: Explicitly states the amendment was rejected due to a bug and removed in version 0.33.0, classifying it as a previous, obsolete version.
Confirms the status of FlowV2 is OBSOLETE/removed, triggering the REJECT rule for retired/obsolete proposals.

output_json.decision_summary: The packet identifies FlowV2 as an obsolete amendment that was previously rejected due to a bug and removed from the codebase. According to the task rules, REJECT is the required route for retired or obsolete proposals.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: Do not claim the amendment is safe to proceed or requires technical review for activation, as it is no longer part of the active codebase.

validator_work_item.recommended_validator_action: Reject the amendment as it is obsolete and removed.
validator_work_item.title: Reject Obsolete Amendment FlowV2
